--- title: "ex18. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends (Bulk-only) - Cauchy Kernel" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Causal Inference: Mixed Backends (Bulk-only) - Cauchy Kernel {#causal-different-backends-bulk} This vignette fits two mixed-backend causal models with a shared Cauchy kernel: - Model A: Treated = SB, Control = CRP - Model B: Treated = CRP, Control = SB --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("causal_alt_real500_p4_k2", package = "CausalMixGPD") y <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$y T <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$T X <- as.matrix(causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$X) summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) summary_tbl %>% mutate(value = signif(value, 4)) %>% kable(caption = "Outcome Summary (Cauchy)", align = "c") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE, position = "center") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Outcome Summary (Cauchy)
statistic value
N 500.000
Mean 0.274
SD 1.764
Min -8.089
Max 5.275
````` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} x_eval <- X[1:40, , drop = FALSE] y_eval <- y[1:40] ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_causal <- data.frame(y = y, T = as.factor(T), x1 = X[, 1]) p_scatter <- ggplot(df_causal, aes(x = x1, y = y, color = T)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + labs(title = "Outcome vs X1", x = "X1", y = "y", color = "Treatment") + theme_minimal() p_scatter ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex18-causal-different-backends-CRP_files/figure-html/data-scatter-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Model A: Treated SB, Control CRP (Cauchy) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_sb_crp <- build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = c("cauchy", "cauchy"), backend = c("sb", "crp"), PS = "logit", GPD = c(FALSE, FALSE), components = c(5, 5), mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1) ) bundle_sb_crp ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` CausalMixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Chinese Restaurant Process
Kernel cauchy cauchy
Components 5 5
GPD tail FALSE FALSE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(bundle_sb_crp) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` CausalMixGPD causal bundle summary CausalMixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Chinese Restaurant Process
Kernel cauchy cauchy
Components 5 5
GPD tail FALSE FALSE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_crp <- run_mcmc_causal(bundle_sb_crp) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Defining model ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Building model ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Setting data and initial values ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Checking model sizes and dimensions ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` [Note] This model is not fully initialized. This is not an error. To see which variables are not initialized, use model$initializeInfo(). For more information on model initialization, see help(modelInitialization). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Checking model calculations ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: beta ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (5) - beta[] (5 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Compiling [Note] This may take a minute. [Note] Use 'showCompilerOutput = TRUE' to see C++ compilation details. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Compiling [Note] This may take a minute.
